title: iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Full Stack Developer in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
